svg.title: The agent fabric
svg.desc: The pipeline and hub sit on top, with seven phase chips. Dashed connectors show custom agents attaching at any node or edge. Below sits the agent fabric, which manifests as in-system form factors (chatbot, button, form, app, automation, scheduled job) and reaches external platforms via MCP.

g.text: agents attach at any node or edge
custom agents · built in minutes · reusable · pluggable
